case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS BUTLER TONI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI $438.27 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $488.77, CHANGE SPELLING OF DEFTS NAME TO BUTLER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $438.59 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $141.10 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO TONI BUTLER RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER TONI
